data.title: Laser Digital, supported by Nomura, is pursuing US bank charter to provide federally regulated crypto trading without deposit-taking.
data.description: If the proposal is accepted, the company could sidestep individual state licensing requirements and provide federally regulated cryptocurrency trading services without accepting deposits.

data.title: Survalent launches Helix Time-Series Historian, expands DERMS capabilities for utilities as grid complexity grows.
data.description: As the grid complexity grows, utilities are increasingly relying on high-resolution historical data and standardized DER integration for support. Survalent, a top provider of advanced operational technology solutions for utilities, announced on Jan. 27, 2026 its commitment to investing in this evolution. This move comes as utilities face mounting challenges, with a substantial increase in DERs being integrated into the grid. Survalent's focus on providing cutting-edge solutions in this rapidly evolving landscape is crucial, with their products playing a key role in helping utilities navigate these changes.

data.title: Survey by Avion Pharmaceuticals shows challenges in pill-splitting for Parkinson's Disease treatment.
data.description: Alpharetta, Georgia - On January 27, 2026, Avion Pharmaceuticals, a subsidiary of Alora Pharmaceuticals dedicated to enhancing treatment for Parkinson's disease, revealed significant results from a new study regarding the practicality of splitting medications. The study offers valuable insights into real-world medical practices.

data.title: happyactually appoints Dr. Maren Voss as Chief Happiness Officer & Scientific Advisor, enhancing their focus on evidence-based wellbeing.
data.description: In Seattle on January 27, 2026, happyactually disclosed the appointment of Dr. Maren Wright Voss as the Chief Happiness Officer, Scientific Advisor, and Founding Member. This move emphasized the company's dedication to evidence-based wellbeing and applied science. Dr. Voss's new roles signify a significant step in consolidating and enhancing the organization's focus on promoting happiness and well-being.

data.title: "Mesh, a crypto payments startup, reaches a $1B unicorn valuation with $75M funding boost, offering cross-network payments."
data.description: Mesh recently secured $75 million in funding, propelling their total funding to an impressive amount. This milestone has elevated Mesh to "unicorn" status within the industry. Mesh specializes in facilitating crypto payments for businesses across various networks.
THE TRUMP ADMINISTRATION WARNS SOUTH KOREA AGAINST TARGETING U.S. TECH FIRMS, INCLUDING COUPANG, SIGNALING POTENTIAL TARIFF HIKES IF SEOUL’S REGULATIONS JEOPARDIZE THE BILATERAL TRADE DEAL.

data.title: Retired Army General Bryan P. Fenton joins USAA Board of Directors; former USSOCOM Commander brings leadership expertise.
data.description: In a recent announcement, USAA disclosed that retired Army General Bryan P. Fenton, a distinguished veteran with a military background including service as Commander of U.S. Special Operations Command, has been appointed to their Board of Directors. Fenton's extensive experience in commanding Special Forces units and strategic defense positions will play a crucial role in steering USAA's commitment to providing exceptional services to the military community. Serving as the 13th Commander of USSOCOM, Fenton directed U.S. Special Operations forces spanning the Army and Navy.

data.title: Momcozy donates 50 wearable breast pumps to King's Daughters Milk Bank in Norfolk, supporting lactation donors.
data.description: Norfolk, Virginia - In a recent development on January 27, 2026, global breastfeeding solutions leader, Momcozy, has generously donated 50 wearable breast pumps to enhance the lactation support available at the milk bank. Among the donated pumps are 25 of the popular Momcozy M5 model. This contribution will significantly boost the resources available for donors at the milk bank.

data.title: Aegis Living partners with DAISY Award to honor exceptional nurses providing compassionate care.
data.description: Bellevue, Washington - On January 27, 2026, Aegis Living was revealed as one of the participating organizations for the prestigious DAISY Award for Extraordinary Nurses®. This renowned program honors nurses for providing outstanding and compassionate care.

data.title: Balerion Space Ventures invests in Northwood Space's $100M Series B round to improve ground infrastructure for space operations.
data.description: Balerion Space Ventures has recently made a strategic investment in Northwood Space, amounting to $100 million. The investment aligns with Balerion's focus on mission-critical infrastructure, particularly in addressing the emerging bottleneck in ground systems within the space economy. This move signifies Balerion's commitment to advancements in the space industry and highlights the importance of enhancing ground systems to support the expansion of space-related activities.

data.title: PICPA VP, Peter Calcara, named in City & State PA Who's Who of Government Relations for his advocacy efforts. Influencing state policy.
data.description: A prominent Pennsylvania organization, The Pennsylvania Institute of Certified Public Accountants (PICPA), has been acknowledged for its influence in shaping state policy. This organization, recognized for advocating on behalf of accounting professionals in Pennsylvania, plays a significant role in the state's decision-making processes. The accolade was announced on January 27, 2026, in Philadelphia. The PICPA is known for its efforts to represent the interests of accounting professionals and ensure their voices are heard in policy discussions. This recognition highlights the organization's impact and leadership in advocating for relevant issues in the state.

data.title: Egan-Jones held 2nd Annual Private Credit Conference with 300 industry leaders focused on market growth & regulations
data.description: Egan-Jones Ratings Company, a prominent private credit ratings provider, recently held its second annual Private Credit Conference in New York on January 27, 2026. The event served as a gathering ground for institutional investors and key figures in the industry to delve into discussions on market expansion, regulatory advancements, and other pertinent topics. With a focus on enhancing understanding within the sector, this conference aimed at fostering collaboration and sharing insights among attendees.

data.title: Big Blue Seafood & Grill now open in Midtown Manhattan, offering a new dining experience. Located at 55 West 44th Street.
data.description: In Midtown Manhattan, a new dining establishment called Big Blue Seafood & Grill has recently started operating. This restaurant, situated at 55 West 44th Street, is brought to the public by the same hospitality group responsible for Empire Steakhouse and Chazz Palminteri Italian Restaurant. Specializing in seafood and grill dishes, Big Blue presents a fresh culinary concept to food enthusiasts in the area. The opening of this restaurant marks another addition to the vibrant dining scene in New York City's bustling Midtown district.

data.title: EOS will turn 850 fans into desserts for the Big Game, correcting previous misinformation from PR Newswire.
data.description: EOS has announced a unique promotion turning fans into dessert for the big game. The company clarified that the original news release contained errors due to transmission issues via PR Newswire. The corrected information has been issued to rectify the mistakes and provide accurate details to the public.
